description: Replace the plain 'Shared' text badge on list rows with stacked avatar indicators showing collaborator profile images (or colored first-initial fallback). Both React web and Swift iOS.

userStories.title: Supabase RPC to fetch collaborator profiles
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a secure way to fetch display names and avatar URLs for people a list is shared with, so the UI can render their avatars.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a Supabase RPC function (e.g. get_list_collaborators) that accepts a list ID and returns { user_id, display_name, avatar_url } for each person the list is shared with
For lists you own: returns all collaborators you've shared with
For lists shared with you: returns the owner plus any other collaborators
Joins list_shares to profiles via email to resolve profile data
Respects RLS — only callable by users who own or are shared on the list
Migration runs successfully
Returns empty array for unshared lists
userStories.notes: Migration 20260321120000 creates SECURITY DEFINER RPC function get_list_collaborators. Auth check, owner vs shared branching, email join to profiles.

userStories.title: React — Reusable Avatar component
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable Avatar component so it can be used on list rows and potentially elsewhere.
acceptanceCriteria: Avatar component accepts imageUrl, displayName, color, and size props
Renders a circular profile image when imageUrl is provided
Renders a circle filled with color containing the uppercase first initial of displayName when no image exists
Initial text is white and centered within the circle
Supports configurable size (default appropriate for list row usage, ~24px)
Works in both light and dark mode
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Avatar.jsx + Avatar.module.css created. Circular image or initial fallback, configurable size/color.

userStories.title: React — AvatarGroup component for stacked display
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an AvatarGroup component that overlaps multiple avatars and shows a '+N' indicator when there are too many to display.
acceptanceCriteria: AvatarGroup component accepts an array of collaborator objects and a maxDisplay prop (default 3)
Renders avatars overlapping left-to-right with a consistent negative margin
When collaborators exceed maxDisplay, shows a '+N' circle at the end using the same size as avatars
'+N' circle uses a neutral background (gray) with white text
Group is right-aligned and vertically centered within its container
Works in both light and dark mode
Lint passes
userStories.notes: AvatarGroup.jsx + AvatarGroup.module.css created. Stacked overlapping avatars with +N overflow.

userStories.title: React — Fetch and display collaborator avatars on list rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the profile images (or initials) of people I share a list with, so I know at a glance who has access.
acceptanceCriteria: ListSelector calls the RPC function to fetch collaborator profiles for shared lists
The 'Shared' text badge is removed and replaced with the AvatarGroup component
Avatar circle fallback color uses the list's color
Avatars are vertically centered and right-aligned in the list row
Non-shared lists show no avatar group (no visual change)
Collaborator data is fetched efficiently (batch or alongside list fetch, not N+1)
Verify in browser
Works in both light and dark mode
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Added fetchListCollaborators to database.js, batch fetch in ShoppingListContext, replaced Shared badge with AvatarGroup in ListSelector.

userStories.title: Swift — Reusable AvatarView component
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable SwiftUI AvatarView so it can be used on list rows and potentially elsewhere in the iOS app.
acceptanceCriteria: AvatarView accepts imageURL, displayName, color, and size parameters
Renders a circular AsyncImage when imageURL is provided
Renders a circle filled with color containing the uppercase first initial of displayName when no image exists
Initial text is white, bold, and centered
Supports configurable size (default ~24pt for list row usage)
Works in both light and dark mode
Build succeeds
userStories.notes: AvatarView created with AsyncImage + initials fallback. Build succeeded.

userStories.title: Swift — AvatarGroupView for stacked display
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a SwiftUI AvatarGroupView that overlaps multiple avatars with a '+N' overflow indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: AvatarGroupView accepts an array of collaborator objects and a maxDisplay parameter (default 3)
Renders avatars overlapping using ZStack with increasing horizontal offset
When collaborators exceed maxDisplay, shows a '+N' circle at the end
'+N' circle uses a neutral gray background with white text
Group is right-aligned and vertically centered
Works in both light and dark mode
Build succeeds
userStories.notes: AvatarGroupView created with ZStack overlap, border ring, +N overflow. Build succeeded.

userStories.title: Swift — Fetch and display collaborator avatars on list rows
userStories.description: As a user on iOS, I want to see collaborator avatars on shared list rows instead of the plain 'Shared' label.
acceptanceCriteria: ListViewModel (or ListService) calls the get_list_collaborators RPC to fetch collaborator profiles
The Text('Shared') capsule in ListRowView is removed and replaced with AvatarGroupView
Avatar circle fallback color uses the list's color
Avatars are vertically centered and right-aligned in the list row
Non-shared lists show no avatar group
Collaborator data is fetched efficiently (batch call for all shared lists, not per-row)
Works in both light and dark mode
Build succeeds
userStories.notes: RPC call added to ListService, batch collaborator fetching in ListViewModel, Shared badge replaced with AvatarGroupView in ListRowView. Build succeeded.
